title: Onboarding - What's new screen - Updating from previous app version
scenario: Verify that after updating from an older app version (pre-5.0.0.X) to the latest, the "Welcome to Poly Studio" screen appears on launch and tapping "Get Started" dismisses it to the Home Screen.
steps: 1. Install an older app version (before 5.0.0.X) on the device.
2. Launch the app and complete any initial setup if needed.
3. Update the app to the latest version.
5. Observe the screen that appears right after launch.
6. Tap the "Get Started" button on the "Welcome to Poly Studio" screen.
7. Observe the screen that appears after tapping "Get Started".
expected: The "Welcome to Poly Studio" screen appears right after launching the updated app. After tapping "Get Started", the screen is dismissed and the user is brought to the Home Screen.
